# LinkedIn Draft - 2026-07-08

Expanding Managed Agents in Gemini API:  background tasks, remote MCP and more

Went through 40 links today. Here's what made the brief:

1. Expanding Managed Agents in Gemini API:  background tasks, remote MCP and more
   Hosted agents now cover a few real workflow gaps instead of only request/response demos.

2. Show HN: Docx-CLI: agents read/edit Word docs using 1/2 the time and tokens
   Document-heavy operator workflows are still painful, and this tool targets a real failure mode.

3. Show HN: PostgreSQL performance and cost across 23 EC2 instance types
   This is directly useful for avoiding overbuilt database infra and bad cost assumptions.

4. Chat SDK now supports Vercel Connect
   Credential handling is one of the messier parts of production bots, and this removes some custom glue for teams already on Vercel.
